synopsis: Aboard a rebel crew's tense trek toward Darth Vader's castle on Mustafar, Lieutenant Thom Hudd spins a chilling tale set during the Clone Wars. On the planet Bray, Jedi Obi-Wan Kenobi and Adi Gallia arrive to stop a Separatist uprising, only to find that Count Dooku has already taken root there. Dooku has allied himself with Ravna, the Lord of Darkness, a vampiric creature whose bite twists its victims into obedient disciples in body and mind. The horror runs so deep that even the dark side of the Force seems to bend before it. Forced into an uneasy alliance with Dooku himself, Obi-Wan moves to bring the monster down, though whether the evil was truly ended remains uncertain.
title: Tales from Vader's Castle #2
